text.message: Blue ill trade sheep and wheat for those bricks
I wont knight to you if you accept
says the guy that blocked me for no reason
You’re on 4 with a down dev and a clear road path what do you expect
i was commenting on 4 7s in a row...
if this would be rl i would flip the table
Red I have wood for roads
Red cmon you gotta build roads
Look at my spots, you think I can compete on roads?
You gotta try Thats all im saying
At this point there’s no point in trying for road
Just got my wisdom tooth out
i have the perfectly wrong cards to do anything lol
Still at 9 with an open settle
